sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click the new magenta center at (56, 27)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 56, 'col': 27}])
print("Action result:", result)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print(f"\nStep: {current_frame.step}")

for node in nodes:
    c = node['color']
    p = node['pixels']
    if c in ['W', 'G', 'M', 'p'] and p <= 25:
        print(f"Node {node['id']}: color={c}, pixels={p}, boundary={node['boundary']}, children={node['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
